north.name: North Gate
north.address: Occidental Ave S & S Royal Brougham Way
north.transit_note: Closest to Link Light Rail (Stadium Station)

south.name: South Gate
south.address: Occidental Ave S & S Atlantic St
south.transit_note: Closest to bus stops on 1st Ave S

notable.122: West sideline, midfield view. Popular season ticket section.
notable.121: West sideline, slightly north of midfield.
notable.123: West sideline, slightly south of midfield.
notable.132: South end, behind goal. Emerald City Supporters (ECS) section.
notable.133: South end, adjacent to ECS. High-energy atmosphere.

notable.210: Club level midfield. Includes lounge access.

notable.322: Upper bowl midfield. Best value with good sightlines.

new_for_2026.name: Ramen Rendezvous
new_for_2026.note: New addition for 2026 season. Tonkotsu and miso options.

light_rail.tip: Trains run every 8 minutes on match days. Arrive at least 30 minutes early for crowds.

bus.nearest_stop: 1st Ave S & S Royal Brougham Way

rideshare.dropoff_zone: 1st Ave S between S Atlantic St and S Royal Brougham Way
rideshare.surge_warning: Expect 2-3x surge pricing 30 minutes after final whistle.

parking.tip: Street parking on Occidental Ave is free after 6 PM on weekdays.

fremont_98103.directions: Take the E Line RapidRide from Aurora Village TC or Fremont to Downtown, transfer to 1 Line southbound at Westlake Station to Stadium Station.

capitol_hill_98102.directions: 1 Line southbound from Capitol Hill Station to Stadium Station.

ballard_98107.directions: Route 40 to Westlake, transfer to 1 Line southbound to Stadium Station.

stadium_changes_2026.description: New LED video boards installed behind both goals
stadium_changes_2026.impact: Enhanced match atmosphere with larger, brighter displays
Wider concourse, two new food vendors, faster service flow

stadium_changes_2026.description: New supporters merchandise kiosk near Section 132
stadium_changes_2026.impact: Dedicated match-day merch for ECS and general supporters
3x faster connectivity for mobile ordering and social sharing

chants_primer.name: Boom Boom Clap
chants_primer.description: Rhythmic clapping that builds in intensity. The whole stadium joins in.

chants_primer.name: Seattle, Seattle
chants_primer.description: Call-and-response chant celebrating the goal. Listen for the drums.

chants_primer.name: Fight and Win
chants_primer.description: Simple, repeating chant. Easy to join in even if it's your first match.

atmosphere.tifo: ECS regularly displays large choreographed banners (tifo) before kickoff. Arrive early to see them.
atmosphere.family_friendly: Sections 300-310 tend to be more family-friendly. ECS sections (121-123) are loud, standing-only, and 21+.
